dc_description: A close-up outdoor photo shows a person centered in the frame, with their face obscured by a large square blur. The person has dark hair, visible neck and shoulders, and appears to be wearing a dark sleeveless or tank-style top with backpack straps. The background is a sunlit street with stone or stucco buildings on the left, parked cars and a bicycle behind the subject, and dense green trees on the right. The image has strong daylight, deep shadows, and a slightly grainy or film-like texture.
novel_visual_observations: The subject is very close to the camera, with the shoulders and upper torso filling the lower half of the frame.
A white round streetlamp or globe light is visible on the building side in the background.
rich_context: Via Ferrucci, Formello, Roma Capitale, Lazio, Italia
